title: Project Alpha
description: A full-stack web application that helps teams manage projects with real-time collaboration features, built with React and Node.js.

title: Design System
description: A comprehensive component library and design system used across multiple internal products, with thorough documentation and accessibility support.

title: CLI Tool
description: A developer productivity CLI that automates common repetitive tasks, supports plugins, and integrates with popular dev tools.

title: Data Dashboard
description: An analytics dashboard that visualizes complex datasets using interactive charts and real-time data streaming.
